scoring.expected_value_score: 1-5 estimate of cash/prize/payout potential if the gate later clears
scoring.proofability_score: 1-5 estimate of how quickly a local proof artifact can be produced without side effects
scoring.gate_risk_score: 1-5 approval burden; 5 means heavy account/legal/payment/wallet/security risk
